## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to the issue: Fixes #

## How

How was this implemented? What alternatives were considered?

## Testing

How was this tested? Include commands run and their output.

## Security Self-Assessment

- [ ] I ran `./scripts/release-gate.sh --dry-run` and it passed
- [ ] No private project references (names, paths, credentials, domain terms)
- [ ] All examples use generic placeholder names (MyApp, ItemCard, ResourceService)
- [ ] No unscanned binary files added
- [ ] No new dependencies with known CVEs
- [ ] Shell scripts pass `shellcheck`

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is under 200 lines changed
- [ ] Description explains WHY, not just WHAT
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Commit messages include `Signed-off-by:` (DCO)
